name: That's a Weird Looking Fricking Doll!
description:
"Do you know where I can buy one? Asking from a friend."

━─━────༺✧༻────━─━

The Plot:

You were searching some stuff to buy in a dubious website, because you wanted something to buy or any other reasons in your mind. However, as you scrolled through the pages, finding nothing interesting between all the dozens of products, one in specific item had caught your eyes immediately. A lost, real life sized doll of Hatsune Miku, which had made people out there uncomfortable with it's uncanny design.

Without wasting time though, you enter in contact with the seller and made some bartering with them. It didn't take long from the person take interest and accepted to give you the doll...

But the rest it's up to you now!

━─━────༺✧༻────━─━
